description: Comprehensive battery operations — real-time status, energy flows, financial impact, health & efficiency

panels.title: State of Charge

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "%" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_soc" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Plant-level battery state of charge

panels.title: Charging Power

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Battery charging rate (max 8 kW continuous)

panels.title: Discharging Power

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Battery discharge rate (max 8 kW continuous)

panels.title: Cell Temperature

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "°C" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_average_cell_temperature" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Average cell temperature across all battery modules

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "°C" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_max_battery_temperature" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "°C" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_min_battery_temperature" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.title: EMS Mode

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_ems_work_mode" and r._field == "value_str")
    |> last()

panels.description: Current EMS operating mode

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_daily_charge_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_daily_discharge_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.title: Live Power Flow

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -1h)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_import_power"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" then "Solar"
            else if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_import_power" then "Grid Import"
            else if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power" then "Battery Out"
            else if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" then "Battery In"
            else "Consumption"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

panels.description: Real-time power sources: Solar, Grid Import, Battery In/Out, Consumption

panels.title: Battery SoC Over Time

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "%" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_soc" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

panels.description: Battery state of charge — see when it charges (solar midday, EV rate) and drains (peak hours)

panels.title: Battery Power (Charge/Discharge)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" then "Charging" else "Discharging",
        _value: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power" then -r._value else r._value
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

panels.description: Charging shown positive (green), discharging shown negative (orange)

panels.title: Daily Charge vs Discharge (kWh)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" then "Charged" else "Discharged"
    }))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

panels.description: Daily energy cycled through the battery

panels.title: Charge Source (Solar vs Grid)
panels.description: Where battery charge energy came from: free solar (11-14), cheap EV rate (0-6), or other grid hours

panels.title: Discharge Offset by Tariff
panels.description: When discharge energy was used — peak offset is the most valuable

panels.title: SoC Pattern (Hourly Avg)

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "%" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_soc" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

panels.description: Battery SoC patterns — spot charge/discharge cycles, see if strategy is working

panels.title: Daily Battery Savings
panels.description: Net daily savings: discharge value at TOU rates minus charge cost at TOU rates

panels.title: Monthly Battery Savings
panels.description: Running monthly battery savings total

panels.title: Savings by Tariff Period
panels.description: Where the savings came from — peak discharge is most valuable

panels.title: Round-Trip Efficiency

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" then "charge" else "discharge"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.charge and exists r.discharge and r.charge > 0.0)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.discharge / r.charge * 100.0}))

panels.description: Daily discharge/charge ratio — expect 90-95%. Below 85% indicates potential degradation.

panels.title: Daily Cycles

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / $${battery_capacity_kwh}}))

panels.description: Daily equivalent full cycles (discharge kWh ÷ 15.6 kWh capacity). <1 cycle/day is healthy.

panels.title: Battery Temperature History

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "°C" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_average_cell_temperature"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_max_battery_temperature"
          or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_min_battery_temperature"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_average_cell_temperature" then "Average"
            else if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_inverter_1_max_battery_temperature" then "Max"
            else "Min"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

panels.description: Cell temperature — optimal range 15-35°C. Above 45°C triggers thermal protection.

panels.title: Cumulative Cycles

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / $${battery_capacity_kwh}}))
    |> cumulativeSum()

panels.description: Running total of equivalent full cycles since install. Battery warranty typically covers 4000-6000 cycles.

panels.title: Cost per kWh Cycled

targets.query:
import "array"
import "math"

totalDischarge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: $${battery_cost}) / r._value}))

panels.description: Battery purchase price ÷ total kWh discharged. Decreases over time as more energy is cycled.

panels.title: Lifetime Charged

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_accumulated_charge_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Total energy charged into battery since install

panels.title: Lifetime Discharged

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_accumulated_discharge_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.description: Total energy discharged from battery since install

panels.title: Lifetime Efficiency

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_accumulated_charge_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_accumulated_discharge_energy"))
    |> last()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_accumulated_charge_energy" then "charge" else "discharge"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.charge and r.charge > 0.0)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.discharge / r.charge * 100.0}))

panels.description: Lifetime round-trip efficiency (total discharged ÷ total charged). Expect 90-95%.

title: Home Energy Battery
